name: Al Fajar Schule Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Raya Cilandak KKO, Cilandak, Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Al Fajar Schule is a smaller Islamic school offering Cambridge qualifications at a more accessible price point.
paragraphs: Parents say Al Fajar Schule is a smaller Islamic school offering Cambridge qualifications at a more accessible price point.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.5K – US$6.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Mosque, Sports facilities.
